en.home.title: Welcome, Honoured Guest
en.home.desc: ✨ Discover premium properties with world-class amenities across India. Enjoy luxurious rooms, fine dining, wellness spa facilities, and curated experiences tailored just for you. Your perfect getaway awaits!
en.footer.about: 🏆 At Go Cabn, indulge in premium hospitality featuring lavish rooms, multi-cuisine restaurants, rejuvenating spa services, recreational activities, and exceptional 24/7 concierge support across India's most sought-after destinations.
en.facilities.title: Premium Amenities & Services
en.facilities.luxury: 💎 Luxury Rooms - Lavish suites with premium furnishings, modern amenities, and breathtaking views
en.facilities.dining: 🍽️ Fine Dining - Award-winning multi-cuisine restaurants with talented chefs and exceptional service
en.facilities.spa: 🧖 Wellness Spa - Rejuvenating treatments, traditional therapies, and holistic wellness programmes
en.facilities.activities: 🎯 Curated Activities - Adventure sports, cultural tours, yoga sessions, and personalised experiences
en.facilities.concierge: 🎩 24/7 Concierge - Expert assistance for reservations, tours, transportation, and special requests
